finding: The tasks scope add command accepted multiple repeated --add flags during TASK-RFT-0063, but only the last path was recorded as an allowed file. Pre-close then treated the other newly created validator modules as outside task scope.
expectedBehavior: Repeated --add flags should add every supplied path, or the CLI should reject ambiguous multi-add syntax with a clear required command.
evidenceOrRepro: TASK-RFT-0063: node atm.mjs tasks scope add --task TASK-RFT-0063 --actor codex-task-rft-0063 --add <path1> ... --add <pathN> --json reported only scripts/validate-police-family/polymorph-rollback-scenarios.ts in addedPaths; taskflow pre-close excluded the remaining new modules until each path was added individually.
followUp: Add parser coverage for repeated --add handling in tasks scope add, plus a taskflow regression that new files under a declared glob are not silently excluded from governed close bundles.
